candidates.title: Invalid sample Gree GMV promotion candidate
candidates.meaning: Invalid staging example used to verify that approval cannot proceed with unverified seed evidence.

source.notes: Invalid sample only. It intentionally lacks manual evidence and must never be promoted.
limitations: Use as a validator failure example only.
Manual verification cannot be claimed without exact source evidence.

likelyCauses: Invalid sample likely cause used only for validator tests.

diagnosticSteps.title: Reject insufficient evidence
diagnosticSteps.instruction: Confirm that the candidate lacks manual page or cross-checked evidence.
diagnosticSteps.expectedResult: The validator reports blocking issues and the candidate remains outside runtime catalog.
diagnosticSteps.ifFailedAction: Keep the candidate in staging until source evidence is corrected.

requiredMeasurements.name: Evidence completeness
requiredMeasurements.description: Reviewer confirms whether manual title, page, and evidence level are sufficient.

safetyNotes: Electrical, compressor, inverter, refrigerant, and protection checks must be performed by a qualified technician.
Keep manufacturer safeguards active during diagnosis and review.
promotionNotes: This sample must fail validator checks.
Do not copy invalid samples into production JSON.
